General.Name: OI Wah Pawnshop Credit Hld Ltd
General.Description: Oi Wah Pawnshop Credit Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of secured financing services in Hong Kong. It offers pawn and mortgage loans; pawn broking and money lending services; and consulting services. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Oi Wah Pawnshop Credit Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Kwan Lik Holding Limited.
General.Address: Kwan Chart Tower, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
